sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n16018" key="a)rxitelw/nhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀρχι-τελώνης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n16018.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">chief toll-collector, chief-publican,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ev.Luc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">19.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
